results.title: Reese Witherspoon and her boyfriend make their red carpet debut in NYC
results.description: Reese Witherspoon and her financier beau, Oliver Haarmann made their first major outing at the premiere of the new "Legally Blonde" prequel "Elle."

results.title: Drive-time talk show host out at Power Talk radio in Fresno after 10 years
results.description: Trevor Carey was let go from Power Talk radio in Fresno amid nationwide iHeartMedia layoffs; he hosted 3–6 p.m. on 96.7 FM and 1400 AM for 10 years and aired his last show Tuesday.
